query:
SELECT 
  transactionType,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  SUM(CAST(totalAmountCHF AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_chf,
  SUM(CAST(fees AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_fees
FROM portfolioTransactions 
WHERE portfolioId = 90001
GROUP BY transactionType;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w4G5FWonHi6U6L.root --database aQvizP6Ne8LKEmBGrk5vq4 --execute SELECT 
  transactionType,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  SUM(CAST(totalAmountCHF AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_chf,
  SUM(CAST(fees AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_fees
FROM portfolioTransactions 
WHERE portfolioId = 90001
GROUP BY transactionType;
